bug_report.summary: Clicking in the editor results in Zettlr leaving maximized split-view state and appearing partially off-screen (desktop visible)
steps_to_reproduce: Launch Zettlr with the main window maximized and split view visible.
(Optional, as in scenario) Open a menu (e.g., Edit).
Click back into the editor area to close the menu and continue editing.
expected_behaviors: The menu closes and the user can continue typing in the same editor pane.
The main window remains maximized and fully on-screen; split-view layout remains intact.
actual_behaviors: The desktop becomes visible and Zettlr is no longer maximized, appearing shifted to the lower-right and partially off-screen.
The editor layout/state changes unexpectedly, disrupting the editing workflow.
